title: Source register with verified per-source licenses (DepMap, Cell Model Passports, Cellosaurus, ICLAC, COSMIC/OncoKB/GDSC dispositions)
context: The catalog draws from a fixed set of upstream resources whose licenses differ (CC-BY-permitted aggregates vs. non-commercial vs. controlled-access vs. link-only). A single source register must record each source's verified license disposition so downstream tasks know what may be redistributed. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Produce a source register listing every upstream resource with its verified license, redistribution disposition, and citation/snapshot.
acceptanceCriteria: Register lists DepMap, Cell Model Passports, Cellosaurus, ICLAC, COSMIC, OncoKB, and GDSC, each with the data it provides and its verified license.
Each source carries an explicit disposition (ACCEPT-redistribute / link-only / EXCLUDE) justified by a cited license clause/URL per the gate-002 criterion.
COSMIC and OncoKB recorded as link-only (not redistributed); GDSC marked terms-pending; controlled-access sources marked EXCLUDE.
Every disposition records license id + URL + snapshot (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL).
No source is default-allowed: any missing/unparseable license is FLAGged rather than treated as permissive.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: SOURCES.md source register with verified per-source license dispositions, committed to the repo.
